name: DevHunt
description: Launch directory specifically for developer tools, libraries and APIs; weekly leaderboard voted on by developers.

auth.notes: Sign in with GitHub (OAuth). Tools are submitted by makers and voted weekly.

best_practices: DevHunt's audience is developers — lead with the technical value (what it does, language/stack, integrations) not marketing fluff.
Tagline should read like a great README headline: precise and benefit-driven for engineers.
Mention if it's open source and link the repo; the crowd rewards OSS and do-follow repo links.
Include a short list of concrete capabilities / supported integrations.
Submit early in the week to maximise time on the weekly leaderboard.
A GIF or short demo video of the tool in action converts far better than screenshots.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: What it does, the stack, and key capabilities for developers.

questions.label: Demo video / GIF URL
questions.help: Short demo of the tool in action.
